title: Shopping Audit Log Entry
description: One JSONL entry recording an action Bestfriend took on a retailer account.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the shopping audit log entry schema.

actionType.description: Retailer action Bestfriend attempted or completed.

retailer.description: Retailer account or site the action targeted.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp for when the action was recorded.

status.description: Outcome state for the recorded action.

screenshotPath.description: Optional local debug screenshot path captured for the action.
